daily.today_energy: The veil between you and your intuition is basically nonexistent right now. Trust those weird little gut feelings showing up today — they're not random, they're receipts from the universe.
daily.love: Someone's energy is giving you mixed signals but your gut already knows the truth. Stop overanalyzing their texts and tune into how you actually *feel* around them. That answer hits different.
daily.career: A creative idea you've been quietly sitting on deserves some air today. Bring it up, sketch it out, send the email. The timing is lowkey perfect even if it doesn't feel that way yet.
daily.health: Your nervous system is asking for something slow today. Even ten minutes of stillness — no scroll, no noise — can genuinely reset your whole vibe. Give your body that kindness.
